text.message: black nb if u promise not to plow me?
You had ore.  Had to try
i'll give insurance with this oj
I'll do after you play your turn
ur welcome blu for not plowing
i expect ur undying loyalty in return
cant let them plow black to the 6
he potentially goes to 9 next turn
idk they look the same to me
but ngl game probably ends before i get the chance to settle 6,2 lol
Wood port is good for him and tripping the 6 is good for 3:1
We need to help black take road
any chance you help feed me a city that way we get more wood on the board?
Cut back to bteak connect maybe
also lowkey why the 9,12 is better
I know he has connect the other way but you need the space
help me cut the other way later
at this point oj should just do the roads
Yeah I'm fine with that too
gotta use a dev or something sry
I have knights but don't want to move it
just hard to trade without knowing devs
Totally get it.  I have 4 knights if you believe
i have a unicorn in my basement
Not sure anyone is gonna feed you here
you have road, cant just trade away points
you got to 9 with that as well
I know red has one lol
at least block the 9 sheep lol
Nah I think ur a bigger threat
how am i still being robbed
therefore u shouldnt be robbing me
sorry red i didn't know 9 would roll
oj is about to win fam
maybe blu is about to win too
can you move knight to black then?
I can move it next time.  Had to play the yop
Hmm blue has the good devs I'm guessing
Anyone wanna give me dev info?
even if i have two plus yop i dont win
oj 1 vp, me 1 vp, blu 2 vps, black 1 vp
black has win in hand lol
Oh man I'm terrible at keeping up lol
i mean you were closer than i was to winning
Well I guess if I robbed him then you couldn't.  Same spot
no i also could've double robbed
